author: Dr15Jones
body:
#### PR description:

- add a 4th entry to thresholdW0_
- change assert to exception to help with further diagnosis 

#### PR validation:

Code compiles. Previously failing jobs caused by the assert (showing out of bound reads) now succeed.

resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2222
title: Avoid array bounds read error in HGCalCLUEAlgo
